description: A patient schedules an appointment online. The system needs to automatically send them a confirmation.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new appointment data from the online scheduling portal.

expected_outcome.value: The system detects a new appointment has been booked.

nodes.task_description: Identify the patient's preferred communication method (email or text).

expected_outcome.value: The system checks the patient's preferences.

nodes.task_description: Automatically send a confirmation message with the appointment details.

expected_outcome.value: The patient receives an immediate confirmation of their appointment, reducing no-shows.
